overall.description: A first-person perspective video game scene depicting a nighttime approach to a classical Greco-Roman temple. The camera moves steadily along a stone pathway lined with manicured hedges and cypress trees, passing burning braziers and through automatically opening iron gates toward the columned entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: classical temple approach path with burning braziers

events.description: stone brazier with fire passes out of frame to the right as camera moves forward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone pathway toward the closed iron gates of the classical temple

entered.detail: stone pedestal with burning fire bowl illuminating the right side of the path
ornate black iron gates closed across the temple entrance
large stone building with columns, triangular pediment, and domed roof
tall thin evergreen trees flanking both sides of the pathway
high stone walls enclosing the temple grounds on both sides
trimmed green hedges lining the edges of the stone pathway

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a stone pathway toward a classical temple at night. A burning brazier on a stone pedestal is passed on the right side early in the segment. The path is lined with manicured hedges and tall cypress trees, with high stone walls visible in the background. The iron gates ahead remain closed as the camera approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: classical temple entrance portal with opening gates

events.description: iron gates begin opening automatically outward as camera approaches the temple entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through the opening iron gates and approaching the columned entrance of the temple

entered.detail: lit wall-mounted lanterns flanking the temple doorway
dark wooden doorway at the base of the columned portico
ornate stone triangular gable above the columns with sculptural details

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the temple entrance as the iron gates swing open outward. Passing through the gateway, the temple's architectural details become prominent including the columned portico, triangular pediment, and lit wall sconces. The stone walls and hedges of the outer path recede into the background as the camera enters the temple's immediate precinct.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person progression from a secluded garden path toward the imposing entrance of a classical temple at night. It begins with a steady walk along a stone pathway, passing a burning brazier on a pedestal while flanked by manicured hedges, tall cypress trees, and high stone walls. As the camera advances, the closed iron gates ahead swing open outward, inviting the viewer into the temple's immediate precinct. The scene then shifts from the narrow garden corridor to a wide architectural vista, where the columned portico, triangular pediment, and glowing wall sconces become the central focus. Finally, the outer walls and hedges recede into the background as the camera arrives at the temple's grand entrance.
